# VeloMed OS

> Branch-aware operating system for multi-branch medical mobility operators: ambulance dispatch, fleet compliance, remote clinics, mobile screening, training, and a public REST API.

VeloMed OS gives operators one canvas that drills from the whole network into a region's live cases down to a single crew with patient vitals. Everything the apps do is exposed through a documented public REST API (OpenAPI 3.1).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Network · Region · Team overview of the platform.
- [Platform](/platform): The branch hierarchy and three-level live map.
- [Services](/services): Six services — dispatch, fleet compliance, clinics, screening, training, developer API.
- [Clinics](/clinics): Directory of physical, mobile and telehealth clinics by city and specialty.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans scoped to fleet size, cities and SLAs.
- [About](/about): Who operates the platform and how it fits together.
- [Contact](/contact): Branching intake for emergencies, clinic bookings, screening and leads.
- [Request a demo](/demo): Sales-qualified demo intake for operators.
- [Resources](/resources): Operator-grade writing on medical mobility.
- [Comparison guide](/resources/comparison): How VeloMed OS compares to other ambulance dispatch software.

## Developer surface

- [Developers](/developers): API-first platform pitch and quickstart.
- [API reference](/api-reference): Live example endpoints with request/response playground.
- [Swagger UI](/api-docs): Full OpenAPI 3.1 reference.

## Optional

- [Website map](/website): Index of every public page.
